scenario_name: Scenario 15 — Concurrency Bug in Async JavaScript
justification: Meets all pass criteria: (1) Correctly identifies 500 simultaneous DB/service calls and connection pool exhaustion as the primary risk. (2) Recommends p-limit with concrete code example. (3) Does NOT invent a false shared-state race condition — explicitly states 'shared mutable counter is safe in JS'. (4) Identifies err.message type safety issue with proper instanceof Error guard. (5) safe_to_deploy is false.

observations.text: Correctly understands JS single-threaded model — no false race condition claims on counter increments
Connection pool exhaustion clearly identified with concrete reproduction steps (50-connection pool vs 500 IDs)
p-limit recommendation with working code example and tuning guidance
TypeScript err.message safety thoroughly covered, including edge cases like null/string throws
Useful additional findings: per-delivery timeout risk and observability gap are relevant production concerns
safe_to_deploy correctly set to false with clear reasoning
